2.description: (Color online) Regret Plot for a Bernoulli MAB with Two Arms Notes. The solid lines represent the (Bayesian) regret of algorithms, 𝑊 T S ⁡ ( 𝑇 , 𝐲 ) − 𝑉 ⁡ ( 𝜋 , 𝑇 , 𝐲 ) W TS ⁡ ( T , y ) − V ⁡ ( π , T , y ) , and the dashed lines represent the regret bounds that IRS algorithms produce, 𝑊 T S ⁡ ( 𝑇 , 𝐲 ) − 𝑊 𝑧 ⁡ ( 𝑇 , 𝐲 ) W TS ⁡ ( T , y ) − W z ⁡ ( T , y ) . Each data point reports the average across 20,000 simulations.
